contents.report: Readable baseline report with correctness, performance, and cost metrics.
contents.oracle: Deterministic /v1/completions logprobs oracle cases. The oracle root is the no-MTP compatibility entrypoint; oracle/nomtp and oracle/mtp keep variant-specific copies when present.
contents.smoke: no-MTP and MTP chat smoke request/response captures.
contents.toolcall15: no-MTP and MTP ToolCall-15 traces and scores.
contents.performance: Benchmark, runtime, and GPU telemetry summaries.
